$comment: Codex CLI integration for JEWEL1k agent-key. Codex's hook/notify surface is still evolving, so this file is a command reference: wire these commands into ~/.codex/config.toml (notify = [...]) or an exec-wrapper script. See docs/HOOKS.md.

on_task_start.description: Blue breathing while Codex is working

on_exec_command_begin.description: Yellow while a shell command runs

command: Codex wants to run a command
on_exec_approval_required.description: Red double blink; blocks until the physical key decides. Exit code 0=approve, 2=deny, 3=timeout (treat non-zero as deny).

command: Codex wants to apply a patch

on_task_complete.description: Soft green when the turn finishes
